historical_capture.source_commit_note: The v1 harness did not capture the source revision or dirty state.
historical_capture.timezone_note: The v1 harness recorded local timestamps without a UTC offset.

groups: Graph build — bulk load all nodes + edges
Full node scan — count + collect every Person id
Point lookups — fetch 500 Persons by id
Edge scan — count every KNOWS edge
Property filter — Persons age>N in one city
Range filter — Persons with score in [40,60]
Group aggregation — count + avg(age) per city
Group aggregation — count + avg(score) per joined_year
Shortest path — 100 Person pairs over KNOWS
Heterogeneous aggregation — count + avg(size) per Company industry
Community detection — Louvain modularity over KNOWS
Degree filter — count Persons with KNOWS-degree ≥ N
Vector kNN — top-K nearest Persons by embedding
Geospatial — Cities within a lat/lon bounding box
Bulk update — set a property on 500 Persons

pattern_match.reason: fluent API cannot express the cyclic triangle pattern

degree_topk.reason: fluent API has no degree+rank primitive

connected_components.reason: fluent API can't CALL procedures; use Cypher connected_components

shortest_path.reason: single-pair shortest path is impractical in pure SQL

connected_components.reason: weakly-connected-components is impractical in pure SQL

three_hop.reason: Kùzu 3-hop var-length exhausts the dense hub graph: RuntimeError

connected_components.reason: WCC needs the kuzu algo extension; not enabled
